---
title: "Operational Dashboard — Where It Moved"
subtitle: "Redirect landing for the retired `uiao-core` wiki page"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

The `whalermike-archive/uiao-core` repository and its wiki — including the
**UIAO-Core Operational Dashboard** page — were retired when the four
predecessor repos (`uiao-core`, `uiao-docs`, `uiao-gos`, `uiao-impl`) were
consolidated into [`WhalerMike/uiao`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao)
on 2026-04-17 ([ADR-028](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-028-monorepo-consolidation-gos-integration.md)).

There is no single successor page — the dashboard's functionality was split
across three surfaces in the new repo:

## 1. CLI

Dashboard artifacts are now produced by the `uiao` CLI. Canonical reference:
[`UIAO_008_CLI_Reference`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/UIAO_008_CLI_Reference_v1.0.md).

| Command | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `uiao conmon dashboard` | Export the KSI continuous-monitoring dashboard — SLA status, drift indicators, trend data. |
| `uiao ir dashboard` | IR governance dashboard — evidence freshness, pending governance actions, drift alerts, pipeline health. |

## 2. Dashboard source and export surface

- [`src/uiao/dashboard/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/src/uiao/dashboard) — export and visualization surface (`export.py`, `ir_dashboard.py`, `ksi.py`). Consolidated from the retired `core/dashboard/` under ADR-032.
- Schema and export readiness are validated in CI by the `dashboard-export` gate.

## 3. Specification and design documents

Dashboard specs, wireframes, and governance artifacts live under
[`docs/docs/governance/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/docs/docs/governance).
Representative pages:

- `dashboard-spec.md`
- `dashboard-wireframe.md`
- `dashboard-heatmap-spec.md`
- `dashboard-reliability-early-warning-spec.md`
- `dashboard-runtime-slo-sli-panel-spec.md`
- `dashboard-systemic-risk-panel-spec.md`
- `dashboard-systemic-risk-early-warning.md`
- `runtime-observability-dashboard.md`
- `runtime-resilience-dashboard-visual.md`
- `corpus-normalization-enforcement-dashboard.md`
- `performance-dashboard-spec.md`

Plus Phase-5 dashboard material in `docs/docs/PHASE5_ExecutiveDashboard.qmd`.

::: {.callout-note title="Maturity caveat"}
Many of the dashboard documents above are aspirational — declared in canon
but not yet implemented at scale. See the [Substrate Status](docs/substrate-status.qmd)
page for per-component adoption state, and
[`inbox/drafts/aspirational-candidates-2026-04-17.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/inbox/drafts/aspirational-candidates-2026-04-17.md)
for the full aspirational catalogue.
:::

## Related entry points

- Repository root: [`WhalerMike/uiao`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao)
- Docs hub: [`UIAO Modernization Atlas`](index.qmd)
- Substrate manifest: [`src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml) (UIAO_200)
- CLI reference: [`src/uiao/canon/UIAO_008_CLI_Reference_v1.0.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/UIAO_008_CLI_Reference_v1.0.md)
